Smart Home Automation using ESP8266 is an IoT-based system that allows users to control and monitor home appliances remotely using Wi-Fi. The system connects electrical devices such as lights, fans, and other appliances to the internet, enabling control through a mobile app or web dashboard.12:45 pm
